title: Enchantment Tomes
description: adds new book like items that can be enchant with specific gear piece enchants then combined with your gear
body:
The enchantment tomes are items that can be enchanted with specific gear enchants and then can be combined with the correct gear piece like regular enchanted books

no more crafting endless sets of diamond helmets just to get respiration or aqua affinity!
#
the recipes are quite simple for tools - stick= blaze powder and material= book and for the mace tome you need 1 breeze rod at the bottom [show](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zYyDFRjb/images/39b03f497021f0eb1520409a098d5f3571c248a7.png)

for armor - book in the center and blaze powder as the armor piece recipe
#
#### due to minecraft limitations bow,crossbow add trident tomes cant be crafted(for now).


## installation :
- Tutorial for datapack installation [link]([https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorial:Installing_a_data_pack](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorial:Installing_a_data_pack))
- For mod version - just put it in the mod folder

## Features (v2.0+):
- adds enchantments tomes that can be enchanted only with specific enchantments
\- Server side only
- no ticking commands
- Using Smithed conventions for compatibility with other packs


## Compatibility:
- Using Smithed conventions for compatibility with other packs
- no known incompatibilities with mods 

## Dependencies :
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API]([https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api))
